title: Weekly Vessel Valuations Report, September 07 2021
summary:
Main
in Weekly Vessel Valuations Report 07/09/2021
Image reference: 2021-09-07_weekly-vessel-valuations-report-september-07-2021_img1.png
Tanker: Tanker values have remained stable. Bulker: Bulker values have remained stable. Capesize Stella Naomi and Stella Nora (180,000 DWT, Sept & Dec 2016, Shanghai Waigaoqiao Shipbuilding) sold to Ciner Ship Management in an en bloc deal for USD 88.00 mil, VV en bloc value USD 87.89 mil - Including Charter, BWTS fitted.
